import torch
import numpy as np
import random

def initialize_training(seed=42):
    # Correct: explicitly set random seeds for all libraries to ensure full reproducibility
    random.seed(seed)
    np.random.seed(seed)
    torch.manual_seed(seed)
    torch.cuda.manual_seed_all(seed)
    
    model = create_model()
    dataset = create_dataset()
    return model, dataset
